title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 19.5%.

items.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: This from Wes Streeting does a decent job of outlining an agenda:  expand high-skill migration, Brexit/EU, energy, housebuilding, and tax reform.

Overlaps with my suggestions (see next post).

Also very "Blairite" - ...
